summary: Iteration 90: Complete testing of 'Registro Saldatori & Patentini' (Welders Module) at /saldatori. Backend: 31/33 pytest tests passed (94%), all CRUD operations work correctly. Frontend: All 17 features verified successfully including master-detail layout, stats bar, status badges, search filtering, welder/qualification CRUD dialogs, and delete confirmations.

minor.issue: Accepts empty name and stamp_id fields - should validate required fields

action_items: Consider adding backend validation to reject empty name/stamp_id in WelderCreate model (minor improvement)
critical_code_review_comments: All data-testid attributes properly implemented for testing (welders-page, btn-add-welder, search-welders, welder-list, welder-item-{id}, welder-detail, btn-edit-welder, btn-delete-welder-detail, btn-add-qual, welder-form-dialog, qual-form-dialog, delete-welder-dialog, delete-qual-dialog)
Status computation working correctly: scaduto for past dates, in_scadenza within 30 days, attivo otherwise
Overall welder status (ok/warning/expired/no_qual) computed correctly based on qualifications
Stats bar shows global counts correctly regardless of search filter
Multipart form upload for qualifications working correctly
Delete welder cascade deletes associated qualification files
seed_data_creation: Test welders were created and cleaned up during testing. Original seed data preserved: Marco Bianchi (wld_test000001), Luca Verdi (wld_test000002), Andrea Rossi (wld_test000003).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Welders module is fully functional. Key data-testids: welders-page, btn-add-welder, search-welders, stats-bar, welder-list, welder-item-{welder_id}, welder-detail, btn-edit-welder, btn-delete-welder-detail, btn-add-qual, qual-row-{qual_id}, btn-del-qual-{qual_id}, btn-dl-qual-{qual_id}, welder-form-dialog, qual-form-dialog, delete-welder-dialog, delete-qual-dialog. Seed data: 3 welders with varying statuses (no_qual, expired, warning). Stats: total=3, ok=0, warning=1, expired=1, no_qual=1, total_qualifications=3.

features_verified.backend_list_welders: PASS - GET /api/welders/ returns list with stats
features_verified.backend_status_computation: PASS - scaduto/in_scadenza/attivo computed correctly from expiry dates
features_verified.frontend_page_load: PASS - /saldatori loads with DashboardLayout, title 'Registro Saldatori'
features_verified.frontend_stats_bar: PASS - Shows 4 stat cards (Saldatori, Qualificati, Attenzione, Patentini Tot.)
features_verified.frontend_welder_list_sidebar: PASS - Shows 3 welders with status indicators
features_verified.frontend_search_filter: PASS - Search filters sidebar list in real-time
features_verified.frontend_click_welder_detail: PASS - Clicking welder shows detail panel with qualifications table
features_verified.frontend_nuovo_saldatore_dialog: PASS - Opens with all fields (name, stamp_id, role, dates, contact, notes)
features_verified.frontend_nuovo_patentino_dialog: PASS - Opens with all fields (standard, process, materials, dates, PDF upload)
features_verified.frontend_delete_welder_dialog: PASS - Shows confirmation with name and warns about associated patentini
features_verified.frontend_delete_qual_dialog: PASS - Shows confirmation with standard and process

tests_executed.results: 31 passed, 2 failed (validation tests for empty fields)

tests: Stats bar (4 cards: Saldatori, Qualificati, Attenzione, Patentini Tot.)
Nuovo Saldatore dialog opens with all fields
Nuovo Patentino dialog opens with all fields
